studies.title: Vorvida - web-based self-help program for reduction of alcohol consumption: a randomized controlled effectiveness trial

_verification.reason: The study is specifically about the digital therapeutic product 'vorvida', as evidenced by the title and detailed description in the full text. The intervention is explicitly stated to be the 'vorvida' program, and the study aims to evaluate its effectiveness.

_classification.reason: The study is described as a randomized controlled effectiveness trial, which involves random allocation of participants to the Vorvida intervention group or a waitlist control group, fulfilling the criteria for an RCT.
